content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION]
( 
	[DispositionID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[Disposition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DispositionCategoryID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[Data] [smallint]  NULL,
	[SetAppt] [smallint]  NULL,
	[Verification] [smallint]  NULL,
	[Confirmation] [smallint]  NULL,
	[Issue] [smallint]  NULL,
	[Presentation] [smallint]  NULL,
	[Sale] [smallint]  NULL,
	[CountAsKill] [bit]  NULL,
	[OkToReset] [bit]  NULL,
	[Comments] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_Dispositionid] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_DispositionCategoryID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
